sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73009" key="o)ligo/deia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγό-δεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contentment with little,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:307" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">307</biblScope></bibl>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
